title: Focus pill in filter sidebar shows active focus and lets user clear it
description:
When the user has focused on a particular issue (using the Focus button in the detail panel), a pill appears at the top of the filter sidebar showing which issue is focused. The pill has a close/X button that deactivates the focus. This replaces the old Focused state on the toolbar filter button.

Scenario: Focus pill appears when focus is active

Given the user has activated focus on an issue (e.g. "Epic: User Authentication" tskl-abc)
When the user opens the filter sidebar
Then a pill is visible at the very top of the filter sidebar above the project checkboxes
And the pill displays the title of the focused issue
And the pill has an X or close icon on its right side

Scenario: Focus pill is absent when no focus is active

Given no focus is currently active
When the user opens the filter sidebar
Then no focus pill is shown
And the project checkboxes appear at the top of the filter content

Scenario: Clicking the focus pill close button deactivates focus

Given the user has activated focus on an issue
And the filter sidebar is open showing the focus pill
When the user clicks the X button on the focus pill
Then the focus is deactivated
And the kanban board returns to showing all issues (subject to other active filters)
And the focus pill disappears from the filter sidebar

Scenario: Focus pill label truncates for long titles

Given the focused issue has a long title
When the focus pill is displayed in the filter sidebar
Then the title is truncated with an ellipsis to fit within the sidebar width
And the X button remains visible and clickable
creator: ryan.porter
